title: Friends — The One Where Monica Gets a Roommate
description: The pilot episode. Rachel arrives soaking wet, and the gang hangs out at Central Perk.
sentences: There's nothing to tell.
He's just some guy I work with.
Come on, you're going out with the guy.
There's gotta be something wrong with him.
So does he have a hump? A hump and a hairpiece?
Wait, does he eat chalk? I just want to be able to say that he eats chalk.
Alright, Joey, be nice. So does he have a hump or not?
Okay, everybody relax. This is not even a date.
It's just two people going out to dinner and not having sex.
Sounds like a date to me.
I'm telling you, she is going to be the most beautiful bride.
Aww, that is so sweet.
I'm sorry, were you talking to me? I was using the term loosely.
Oh my God. It's Rachel Green.
Oh my God, it's Rachel Green!
Oh, I know, I know. I'm a terrible, terrible person.
Well, actually, speaking of terrible people, wasn't your father supposed to give you away?
Oh, oh, that is so not the point.
God, it's just like all my life, everyone has always told me, you're a shoe.
But what if I don't want to be a shoe?
What if I want to be a purse, you know? Or a hat?
No, I don't want you to buy me a hat.
I'm just saying that I need to make a place for myself in this world.
It's okay. I'm just glad you didn't marry him.
Yeah, he was really not right for you.
I just... I feel so stupid.
You are not stupid. You just had a plan and it didn't work out.
Now you just need to make a new plan.
Okay. Okay. I can do this.
I'm going to get one of those job things.
